name: t8040vmenusansptr
purpose: Full GE-sized menu shell minus the two menu05_09 object/data pointer words at 0x40540/0x40544.

patches.note: diagnostic disable second moving gunbarrel display-list command
diagnostic gunbarrel case1 x decrement 3.625 upper
diagnostic gunbarrel case1 x decrement move to f8
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper texture setup upper
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper texture rectangle target width
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper height load upper
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper texture setup lower
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper height load
diagnostic restore stock title/sniper texture rectangle lower width

name: t8040menuscalesonly
purpose: Only GE-style menu float/scale constants on top of t8040viewge. This intentionally excludes the old slow/front texture ingredients so save-select icon/text regressions can be separated from menu scale changes.
